vulnerable_window: Failed init paths free qp->sq.queue and qp->rq.queue without clearing those pointers; rxe_qp_from_init error path calls rxe_queue_cleanup(qp->sq.queue), then drops srq, scq, rcq, and pd refs without clearing qp fields.
fixed_window: Failed init paths free qp->sq.queue and qp->rq.queue then set queue pointers to NULL; rxe_qp_from_init error path clears qp->pd, qp->rcq, qp->scq, and qp->srq before dropping refs.

vulnerable_window: rxe_elem_release obtains elem from kref, loads pool/type info, calls pool->cleanup(elem) when present, then frees backing object with kfree(obj) when allocated by pool.
fixed_window: Same source window as vulnerable ref in selected fix; the release function is stack evidence, while the patch changes earlier failed-init cleanup state in rxe_qp.c.

vulnerable_window: destroy_session locks session_list_mutex internally, removes sess->list_node, unlocks, and frees sess; amdtee_close_session calls kref_put(&sess->refcount, destroy_session) after handle_close_session and handle_unload_ta.
fixed_window: destroy_session requires caller-held session_list_mutex and no longer locks it internally; amdtee_close_session calls kref_put_mutex(&sess->refcount, destroy_session, &session_list_mutex).

vulnerable_window: sctp_sock_dump takes struct sctp_transport *tsp, derives ep = tsp->asoc->ep, then lock_sock(sk) and walks ep->asocs without first holding endpoint reference through traversal.
fixed_window: sctp_sock_dump receives struct sctp_endpoint *ep from traversal, uses sk = ep->base.sk, lock_sock(sk), then checks if ep != tsp->asoc->ep before walking associations.

vulnerable_window: sctp_endpoint_destroy clears sctp_sk(sk)->ep, sock_put(sk), kfree(ep), and decrements object count directly; sctp_endpoint_hold uses refcount_inc(&ep->base.refcnt).
fixed_window: sctp_endpoint_destroy_rcu frees endpoint after RCU callback; sctp_endpoint_destroy calls call_rcu(&ep->rcu, sctp_endpoint_destroy_rcu); sctp_endpoint_hold returns refcount_inc_not_zero(&ep->base.refcnt).

vulnerable_window: igmp_start_timer sets im->tm_running = 1; if (!mod_timer(&im->timer, jiffies+tv+2)) refcount_inc(&im->refcnt);
fixed_window: igmp_start_timer sets im->tm_running = 1; if (refcount_inc_not_zero(&im->refcnt)) { if (mod_timer(&im->timer, jiffies + tv + 2)) ip_ma_put(im); }
